title: To Roger
subtitle: Independent Fiction Publication

overview.value: To Roger (A5, 154p) is an independently written and self-published fiction set in a zombie apocalypse, focusing on how humanity persists in desolation. Through iterative editing, visual prototyping, and self-publication, I shaped a cohesive narrative and aesthetic that reflects both the fragility and strength of love.

outcomes: Designed full layout, typography, and cover art for print
Integrated text and visual composition to enhance thematic immersion
Self-published and distributed 70 copies through personal channels

title: RGBN Slogan
subtitle: Logo and Slogan Design

overview.value: Serving as Creative Director and Graphic Designer, I led RGBN's brand renewal by redesigning the logo and producing custom merchandise like a signature towel slogan. As a result, we established a cohesive visual identity that unified our storytelling and strengthened audience recognition.

outcomes: Enhanced the band’s brand storytelling, allowing visual design and performance atmosphere to reinforce one another in conveying warmth, nostalgia, and vitality.
Established a cohesive visual identity that embodied the band’s emotional and thematic essence.
Created a renewed logo and towel slogan design that strengthened audience recognition and connection during live performances.
